name: Zenith AdBlocker — Ad Blocker & Privacy Guard
author: roshanxcvi
description: The ultimate ad blocker by roshanxcvi. Blocks ads, trackers, fingerprinting, crypto miners, cookie popups & annoyances. Compatible with Chrome Zero acceptable ads.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://easylist.to https://pgl.yoyo.org https://secure.fanboy.co.nz https://malware-filter.gitlab.io https://easylist-downloads.adblockplus.org; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
